parameters.query:
-- Fetch all active users (pilot, growth, enterprise — not churned or free)
SELECT
  pa.user_id,
  au.email,
  pa.tier,
  pa.status AS pilot_status
FROM admin.pilot_accounts pa
JOIN auth.users au ON au.id = pa.user_id
WHERE pa.status NOT IN ('churned', 'free')
  AND au.email IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pa.created_at;

={{ 
'-- Signal velocity: count signals per company + type per week (last 12 weeks)\n' +
'WITH weekly_counts AS (\n' +
'  SELECT\n'  +
'    s.company_id,\n' +
'    COALESCE((s.meta->>\x27company_name\x27)::text, \x27Unknown\x27) AS company_name,\n' +
'    s.signal_type,\n' +
'    DATE_TRUNC(\x27week\x27, s.created_at) AS week,\n' +
'    COUNT(*) AS signal_count,\n' +
'    MAX(s.created_at) AS last_signal\n' +
'  FROM control_plane.signals s\n' +
'  JOIN control_plane.packets p ON p.id = s.packet_id\n' +
'  WHERE p.user_id = \x27' + $json.user_id + '\x27\n' +
'    AND s.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL \x2712 weeks\x27\n' +
'  GROUP BY s.company_id, s.meta->>\x27company_name\x27, s.signal_type, DATE_TRUNC(\x27week\x27, s.created_at)\n' +
'),\n' +
'velocity_stats AS (\n' +
'  SELECT\n' +
'    company_id,\n' +
'    company_name,\n' +
'    signal_type,\n' +
'    COUNT(DISTINCT week) AS weeks_tracked,\n' +
'    AVG(signal_count) AS avg_signals,\n' +
'    STDDEV(signal_count) AS stddev_signals,\n' +
'    MAX(last_signal) AS last_signal_at\n' +
'  FROM weekly_counts\n' +
'  GROUP BY company_id, company_name, signal_type\n' +
')\n' +
'SELECT\n' +
'  company_id,\n' +
'  company_name,\n' +
'  signal_type,\n' +
'  weeks_tracked,\n' +
'  ROUND(avg_signals, 2) AS avg_signals_per_week,\n' +
'  ROUND(COALESCE(stddev_signals, 0), 2) AS stddev_signals_per_week,\n' +
'  last_signal_at\n' +
'FROM velocity_stats\n' +
'ORDER BY company_name, signal_type;'
}}

={{ 
'-- Prediction calibration: per-company accuracy stats\n' +
'WITH pred_stats AS (\n' +
'  SELECT\n' +
'    p.company_id,\n' +
'    p.company_name,\n' +
'    COUNT(*) AS total_predictions,\n' +
'    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.outcome = \x27correct\x27) AS correct_count,\n' +
'    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.outcome = \x27partial\x27) AS partial_count,\n' +
'    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.outcome = \x27incorrect\x27) AS incorrect_count\n' +
'  FROM control_plane.predictions p\n' +
'  LEFT JOIN control_plane.prediction_outcomes po ON po.prediction_id = p.id\n' +
'  WHERE p.user_id = \x27' + $('Loop Users').first().json.user_id + '\x27\n' +
'    AND po.outcome IS NOT NULL\n' +
'  GROUP BY p.company_id, p.company_name\n' +
')\n' +
'SELECT\n' +
'  company_id,\n' +
'  company_name,\n' +
'  total_predictions,\n' +
'  correct_count,\n' +
'  partial_count,\n' +
'  incorrect_count,\n' +
'  ROUND(100.0 * (correct_count + 0.5 * partial_count) / NULLIF(total_predictions, 0), 1) AS accuracy_rate\n' +
'FROM pred_stats\n' +
'WHERE total_predictions > 0\n' +
'ORDER BY company_name;'
}}

={{ 
'-- Severity percentiles per signal type for this user\n' +
'SELECT\n' +
'  s.signal_type,\n' +
'  COUNT(*) AS total_signals,\n' +
'  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.severity) AS severity_p25,\n' +
'  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.severity) AS severity_p50,\n' +
'  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.severity) AS severity_p75,\n' +
'  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.90) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.severity) AS severity_p90\n' +
'FROM control_plane.signals s\n' +
'JOIN control_plane.packets p ON p.id = s.packet_id\n' +
'WHERE p.user_id = \x27' + $('Loop Users').first().json.user_id + '\x27\n' +
'GROUP BY s.signal_type\n' +
'HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10\n' +
'ORDER BY s.signal_type;'
}}
